mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, status, total_amount, created_at FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, status, total_amount, created_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, status, total_amount, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{status}, #{totalAmount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity FROM order_items WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, unit_price, quantity) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity})
